title: Fix company logo display and wire CTA button to email

requirements.text: Fix the company logo rendering in the Header and Footer so that it displays correctly and clearly against the Finnish blue and white backgrounds. The logo source is frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-brand.dim_300x80.png. Ensure correct image path, appropriate sizing (preserve original aspect ratio), and that no broken image or placeholder appears.

quotes: can you please fix the company logo

acceptanceCriteria: The Test2Deploy logo renders visibly in the Header without distortion or broken image
The Test2Deploy logo renders visibly in the Footer without distortion or broken image
The logo preserves its original aspect ratio and proportions
The logo is legible against the Header's white/light background and the Footer's Finnish blue background

requirements.text: Update the 'Book Your Free 15-Minute Launch Readiness Call' button in the FinalCTASection so that clicking it opens a mailto link to pankaj.kumar@test2deploy.eu. The button should render as an anchor tag (or use window.location) with href="mailto:pankaj.kumar@test2deploy.eu" rather than a non-functional button.

quotes: when someone clicks on Book Your free 15 minute Launch readiness call, it should redirect to pankaj.kumar@test2deploy.eu

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Book Your Free 15-Minute Launch Readiness Call' in FinalCTASection opens the user's default email client with pankaj.kumar@test2deploy.eu pre-filled as the recipient
The button uses href="mailto:pankaj.kumar@test2deploy.eu" (rendered as an <a> tag)
The button's visual appearance (color, size, hover state) remains consistent with the Finnish blue theme

constraints: Do not change the overall Finnish flag blue and white visual theme
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Changing any other CTA buttons beyond the FinalCTASection button
